title: wolfhsm counter.rs: Counter RAII handle
description: Create wolfhsm/src/counter.rs. Counter struct holds id: NvmId and a ref to Client (or is a method namespace on Client). Client methods: counter_init(id: NvmId, value: u32) -> Result<u32, WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_CounterInit (returns server confirmation value). counter_increment(id: NvmId) -> Result<u32, WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_CounterIncrement. counter_read(id: NvmId) -> Result<u32, WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_CounterRead. counter_reset(id: NvmId) -> Result<u32, WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_CounterReset. counter_destroy(id: NvmId) -> Result<(), WolfHsmError> calls wh_Client_CounterDestroy. All through error::check(). Counters saturate at u32::MAX per wolfHSM spec — document this in comments. In lib.rs: pub mod counter;
